title: Graph Challenge: Perform BFS traversal 1
description: Given an adjacency list or edge list representation of a graph, perform bfs traversal. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) or O(E log V) time complexity depending on the problem type.

title: Graph Challenge: Perform DFS traversal 2
description: Given an adjacency list or edge list representation of a graph, perform dfs traversal. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) or O(E log V) time complexity depending on the problem type.

title: Graph Challenge: Find the shortest path 3
description: Given an adjacency list or edge list representation of a graph, find the shortest path using bfs. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) or O(E log V) time complexity depending on the problem type.

title: Graph Challenge: Detect a cycle in 4
description: Given an adjacency list or edge list representation of a graph, detect a cycle in an undirected graph. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) or O(E log V) time complexity depending on the problem type.

description: Given an adjacency list or edge list representation of a graph, detect a cycle in a directed graph. Ensure your algorithm is optimized for O(V + E) or O(E log V) time complexity depending on the problem type.
